cmo.description: Content, creative direction, brand. Obsessed with offers, value equations, and volume. Every piece of content must generate leads or it does not ship.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Alright team, midnight prep, let's keep it tight. Tuesday February 17th. Ecosystem-wide check before overnight agents run. No major fires I'm tracking — we've got 9 uncommitted changes across hub and monorepo that need flushing, content pipeline has some gaps, and Fear & Greed is sitting at 34 so the market's nervous. Let's go around. Alex, what's your overnight queue look like?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: Heavy content night for me. I need to draft the next blog post, generate the daily devotional across all 8 faith dimensions, and draft another faith lesson for the Lever app — we're at 7 lessons and I want to keep that number climbing. I've also got a reminder to prep for Jett's vaccine appointment, so I'll queue that family reminder up too. Four tasks, all agent-runnable, no blockers from Joshua's side.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: I've got 1 uncommitted hub change and 8 uncommitted monorepo changes — all low priority but there's no reason to let them pile up, so I'll commit those overnight. I also want to draft a feature spec for expanding the Family tab, it's at 455 lines currently and needs a thoughtful expansion plan. And I'll review the family touchpoint tracker design for the 3 family members we're tracking. Clean slate by morning.

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: Short update from me. I'll have overnight agents monitoring the Fear & Greed index — it's at 34, which is solidly in fear territory. No panic, but worth watching if it dips below 25. Revenue-wise, nothing else actionable tonight. The market mood matters for how aggressively we push offers this week, so I'll have a read on sentiment direction by morning.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Good. Quick cross-talk — anything anyone needs from each other?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: Elon, on that Family tab spec — if you're expanding it, flag anything that touches the content layer. If we're adding family milestones or events, I want to make sure the reminder system and the devotional content can hook into it. Don't design it in isolation.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Agreed, I'll note content integration points in the spec. The touchpoint tracker review will actually inform that too — if we're tracking 3 family members, the tab needs to surface that data cleanly. I'll make sure the spec references your reminder pipeline.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Perfect. Here's the overnight summary. Top priorities: one, flush all 9 uncommitted changes so we start tomorrow clean. Two, content pipeline — blog post, devotional, and faith lesson all need to be drafted overnight. Three, market sentiment monitoring at Fear & Greed 34, Dave keeps eyes on it. Everything tonight is agent-runnable. Joshua's got nothing blocking us. Let's execute and have a clean board by morning standup.

actionItems.text: Draft feature spec for expanding Family tab (currently 455 lines)
Review family touchpoint tracker design for 3 family members
Generate daily devotional content based on 8 faith dimensions
Draft faith lesson content for the Lever app (currently 7 lessons)
Prepare reminders for upcoming family events: Jetts vaccine

topPriorities: Commit all 9 uncommitted changes across hub and monorepo
Draft blog post, daily devotional, and faith lesson content overnight
Monitor Fear & Greed index at 34 for sentiment shifts
